name: Statusnook
tagline: Effortlessly deploy a status page and start monitoring endpoints in minutes
description:
Effortlessly deploy a status page and start monitoring endpoints in minutes

Docs: https://statusnook.com?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  statusnook:
    volumes:
      - statusnook-data:/app/statusnook-data
    image: goksan/statusnook
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - wget
        - -q
        - --spider
        - http://127.0.0.1:8000
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 15
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42116:8000
volumes:
  statusnook-data: null
